questions.scenario: The app almost always reads the active checkout draft by user ID. Which path is easy to explain?

options.text: A Cloud Storage object lifecycle rule.

questions.explanation: The path should match the common lookup question.

questions.scenario: A Firestore design starts with fields but cannot answer how the app will query documents. What is missing?

options.text: A Cloud SQL engine version only.

questions.explanation: Firestore design should start with reads and writes the app must perform.

questions.scenario: Which access-pattern questions fit Firestore design?

options.text: Can the app name the document path?
Can we avoid modeling and query anything later for free?

questions.explanation: Firestore is flexible, but query shape still matters.
